title: lecythis pisonis subsp. usitata
intro: Lecythis pisonis subsp. usitata, also known as the Brazil nut tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Amazon rainforest. The seeds of this plant are rich in medicinal properties, containing high levels of protein and fatty acids, as well as antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lecythis pisonis subsp. usitata seeds include their potential to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain types of cancer, due to their high levels of selenium and magnesium. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often used to make supplements or extracts, which can be consumed to reap their medicinal and health benefits.
